prompt: Review screen code with multiple architecture violations

assertions.text: Identifies useQuery/api.* import in screen as a boundary violation
Identifies filter/sort logic in screen as misplaced business logic
Notes the screen is too thick / doing too much
Recommends moving data access to features/pack-members/hooks/ or similar feature hook location
Shows a refactored version of the code with proper separation
Notes the project uses NativeWind/Tailwind, not inline styles
